headline: PepsiCo Balances Dirty Mountain Dew Launch With Snack Pricing And ESG Risks
summary: PepsiCo (NasdaqGS:PEP) is rolling out Dirty Mountain Dew, a ready to drink soft drink, across the US. The company is implementing major snack price cuts in its Frito Lay business after earlier shelf space losses tied to higher pricing. Shareholders are renewing activism on human rights and supply chain oversight, putting ESG topics back in focus. For you as an investor, these moves all affect core parts of PepsiCo’s model, from beverages to snacks. Dirty Mountain Dew extends the company’s...
